parts.text:
```plantuml
@startuml
class BattlerOrder
class TurnSystem
class BattleFlow
class BattleContext
class PlayerMainTactics
class Player
class PassiveProperty
class ActiveTargetResult
class InvocationContext
class ITargetable
class TargetSelection
class AiInvocationContext
class TurnContext
class Battler
class TP
class Attribute
class Tolerance
class HP
class MP
class Ability
class PassiveEffectManager
class PassiveEffect
class BattleEvent
class ActiveEffect
class BattleEventHandler
class ActiveProperty
class ActiveTargetRange
class ActiveTargetFilter
class VisualEffectContext
class VisualEffect

BattlerOrder <-- TurnSystem
TurnSystem <-- BattleFlow
BattleFlow o-- BattleContext
BattleContext o-- Player
PlayerMainTactics <-- Player
Player o-- PassiveProperty : PartySkill
ActiveTargetResult o-- ITargetable
InvocationContext <-- TargetSelection
ITargetable <|-- Battler
TargetSelection <-- Battler
AiInvocationContext <-- Battler
TurnContext <-- Battler
PassiveProperty <-- Battler : PassiveSkill
TP <-- Ability
Attribute <-- Ability
Tolerance <-- Ability
HP <-- Ability
MP <-- Ability
Ability <-- Battler
PassiveEffectManager <-- Battler
PassiveEffect <-- PassiveEffectManager
BattleEvent <-- PassiveEffect
BattleEvent <-- ActiveEffect
BattleEvent <-- BattleEventHandler
PassiveEffect <-- BattleEventHandler
ActiveEffect <-- BattleEventHandler
ActiveProperty o-- ActiveEffect
ActiveProperty o-- ActiveTargetRange
ActiveTargetRange o-- ActiveTargetFilter
VisualEffectContext <-- VisualEffect
ActiveProperty <-- VisualEffect : ActiveEffect?
PassiveProperty o-- PassiveEffect
BattleContext o-- Battler
PlayerMainTactics <-- Battler
@enduml
```
